reasoning: Greenfield AI content generation system requiring new architectural patterns for multi-format support (blog, FAQ, press release), GEO optimization research (specialized domain), database schema design, and brand voice matching. Cross-cutting changes span UI, API, database, and AI integration layers.

scope.notes: Single Next.js app but touches UI components, API routes, database schema, and AI service layer. Multi-format support (blog, FAQ, press release) requires flexible architecture.

integrations.notes: Already has @anthropic-ai/sdk and OPENAI_API_KEY configured. Research needed for GEO optimization patterns (distinct from traditional SEO) and brand voice matching techniques.

infrastructure.notes: Database schema changes needed for brand voice guidelines, generated content storage, visibility gap data, and content templates. May need new env vars for generation settings (max tokens, temperature, etc.).

knowledge.notes: Codebase has AI integration patterns (Anthropic SDK exists) but GEO optimization is specialized domain requiring research. Brand voice matching and visibility gap analysis are new patterns.

concerns: Brand voice consistency and quality control
AI API cost management for bulk generation
Database schema design for multi-format content
Integration with existing visibility gap data sources
risk.notes: Medium risk due to database schema changes, AI quality assurance needs, and integration with existing GEO monitoring workflow. This is a content drafting tool (not auto-publishing), so quality risks are manageable. Main concerns are cost management, brand voice accuracy, and data integration patterns.

validation_recommendations.reasoning: Database schema changes and AI integration require unit tests for content generation logic and integration tests for API endpoints and database operations. While AI-generated content has quality risks, this is a content drafting tool (not publishing), so security scan not critical. No auth, payment, or user data security changes involved.
